name: In West Valley City, how to value hearing aids in my claim?

mainEntity.name: In West Valley City, how to value hearing aids in my claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Include full cost of prescription aids, fittings, batteries as medical benefits.** Impairment rating factors device needs into PPI.[1][3] Utah comp covers occupational aids. Receipts and quotes required. Future replacements too.[4]
